analytics.last_inbound_snippet: Subject: Leads Data\n\nBody: Hi Emily, I hope you are well. Please find attached the leads data for both your locations.

messages.body: Thank you for calling the Highlands Baseball and Post Falls. This is Sierra. How can I help you? Hi Sierra. Has Emily walked in today? She is not. Can I leave a message for her? Ah yes. You can just take down a message b…
Please let us know if there's anything else we can help you with
We have ensured everything is removed
Why am i still receiving appointment requests? All info with highlands on you end needs to be removed.
I hope this is sorted, thank you for your patience.
Hello??????? I’m still receiving messages from zoca after repeatedly asking for this to be removed and cancelled.
Im still receiving booking requests from Zoca. I need the landing page websites deleted immediately to avoid further confusion with our clients.
I also need the $500 refunded as i asked to cancel the subscription 10 days before it renewed. I will not be using this service in November.
We really apologise for any inconvenience this has caused you and will ensure the experience is much better going forward. We have ensured on our end no new invoice is generated going forward.

Hi Emily, based on our record - we see you mentioned cancellation on 20th regarding the desktop app through this particular channel, post which we shared the link of the web dashboard.   We have gone through the whole em…
Let us know if there's anything else we can help you with.
Yes, but I’ve cancelled as of the 13th. My payment info should be removed immediately. Thats over 10 days ago
I was charged today after I requested to cancel over a week ago
Emily I am looking at the dashboard now and I can see these are invoices that were generated a week before as the payment  cycle date is fixed for each and every client.
Hi Emily, I hope you are well. On my end, I have already highlighted this management and have also mentioned no new invoices should be generated
Still confused why I was charged $500 when I requested to cancel over a week ago, and also why I’m not receiving a response from you.
I need my credit card removed from this immediately
Why is Zoca still attempting to charge my card when I have put in a cancellation request over a week ago?

We can build two separate flows for returning and new client and redirect returning clients directly to your true website. Its easi r to capture new leads through the landing page we have built due to its SEO optics and …

Hi Emily, you have been getting a lot of traffic on both accounts especially in terms on new clients. If there's issues with conversion - we can help you with that but we would love to understand your feedback/concerns. …
I would like to cancel.
There’s also zero emails attached to the lead documents I requested
I’ve already switched my Google list back to my regular website. I’d prefer not to waste my time in having a meeting. I just need the service canceled for both accounts.
Noted, please let me know when we can schedule an off boarding meeting next week to remove all your data and note your feeeback.
Yes. We are getting traffic but theres confusion with our normal recurring guests. I would like to cancel.
There’s also the aspects of the landing page not being our true website. This is lead to a lot of confusion with our clientele. I need both subscriptions canceled.
I had emailed the lead data to your on 14th of October and again on 17th of October post seeing the above message.

Also, I haven't received any email regarding cancellation. I see we are getting good traffic for both locations even through reviews haven't been very consistent and there's been some one star review.
Please let me know if you would like to connect on a meeting, I would be happy to answer any doubts you might have regarding optimisation of your profiles.

No i explaned on my email that i sent on the 13th that the reason im canceling was a lack of a desktop app. If my front desk is unable to access then all the leads i receive arent being contected as quickly as they need …

You have to login with the account you are logged in on the app with.  overview, chatbot, website metrics, gbp, etc. may not work properly -- data might be off but the leads section would work properly.  if you need a de…
Emily , you can access the web dashboard : http://app.zoca.com
Hi Emily, I hope you are well.
Subject: Leads Data\n\nBody: Hi Emily, I hope you are well. Please find attached the leads data for both your locations.
Hi Asmita, making sure my request to cancel was received. I submitted it over email. I also haven’t received these leads yet either.
Hello, i would like to pull my client list from each location and have it emailed to highlandsdayspa@outlook.com.
Sure Emily, let me email it to you for both locations.

Subject: Re: Lead data - Coeur d'Alene\n\nBody: Good Afternoon,  I'd like to get both the Lead Data sheets from my two accounts, and then move to ending my service with Zoca. I feel there's a lot of value in the service,…
